ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-10-2025 Continued To May-12-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jonathan O'Donnell for Anna Kauffman, Co-Trustee (via Zoom).
Matthew Harris for Ilse Lemke, Settlor/Co-Trustee (via Zoom).

The court acknowledged receipt of the parties' joint case management statement.

Mr. Harris reported that the Corte Madera property referenced in the Petition for Order Settlement Accounts has been sold and the focus should shift to disposition of proceeds rather than property management.

Discussions were held regarding a pending Writ Petition and Discovery issues. Mr. O'Donnell indicated that the writ petition was being prepared by Ms. Lily Harris' office, and that it would be filed on time.

The court continued the matter to May 12, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow time for resolution for the writ and potential discovery disputes. Counsel shall file an updated/supplemental Case Management Statement by May 2, 2025.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Jonathan O'Donnell and Lily M. Harris for Anna Kauffman, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Matthew W. Harris for Ilse Lemke, Trustor (via Zoom)

Counsel for Anna Kauffman contests the court's tentative decision. After hearing arguments, the court takes the matter under submission with intent to adopt the tentative ruling as modified, to clarify that requested communications between Anna Kauffman and her counsel shall be limited to the time she served as co-trustee.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Independent Medical Examination
Off Calendar Sep-05-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lily Harris appeared by zoom for Anna Kauffman (petitioner).
Matthew Harris appeared by zoom for Ilse Lemke (trustor/co-trustee).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions in response to the tentative ruling. Upon conclusion of argument, the court adopted its tentative ruling. The Motion to Compel Independent Medical Examination is denied.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Monica Shoonover, CSR #10220, 530-209-3326, mlscsr10220@gmail.com

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-14-2024 Continued To Nov-06-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lily Harris appeared by zoom for Anna Kauffman (petitioner).
Matthew Harris appeared by zoom for Ilse Lemke (trustor).

Mrs. Harris stated that the deposition of Mrs. Lemke is somewhat on hold, that there is motion to compel an independent medical examination on calendar for September 5th and that the thought is to see what happens with the motion first before proceeding with the deposition. Mr. Harris stated that he intends to oppose the motion. Further discussion was held regarding the return of the Volvo, the documents to transfer title of the vehicle needing to be signed, Mrs. Kauffman's concern about liability if the vehicle remains in her name, Mr. Harris' position that he is going to have tow truck go over and take the car, Mr. Harris' position that his client has the capacity to settle this case, the ongoing dispute between the attorneys, etc. The court stated that it would really like the parties to work this out and offered an informal discovery conference. The case management hearing and the Petition for Order Settling Accounts, etc. are continued to November 6, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. A supplemental joint case management statement is to be filed on or before October 25, 2024.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Magdaleno. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar May-22-2024 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Settling Accounts, Passing Upon Acts Of And Instructing Co-Trustee
Off Calendar May-22-2024 Continued To Aug-14-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lily Harris appeared by zoom for Anna Kauffman (petitioner).
Matthew Harris appeared by zoom for Ilse Lemke (settlor/co-trustee).

The parties reported that one deposition was conducted last Thursday, that they obtained Wisconsin counsel, that depositions need to be taken, that this matter is headed for trial, and that they still need to conduct some discovery. Further discussion was held regarding the issue of capacity, Mr. Harris' client's money dwindling and the possibility of needing to sell the home in Marin, whether the matter should be heard in Wisconsin or remain here, language in the trust instrument, the possibility of Mr. Harris filing a motion to expunge lis pendens and a petition for instructions to sell the property, there being a factual dispute regarding capacity, etc. The court orders that petitioner Anna Kauffman is barred from using trust assets to pay for this litigation without a court order. The court explained the purpose of a joint case management statement ("CMS") and the information to be provided in the CMS. The Petition for Order Settling Accounts, etc. is continued to August 14, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. A case management hearing is also set for that same date. The parties are to file a joint case management statement prior to the hearing. The court will issue a case management order. Status of mediation is off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Svalhin. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar Mar-13-2024 Continued To May-22-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lily Moallem Harris appeared by zoom for and with Anna Kauffman by zoom.
Matthew Harris appeared by zoom for Isle Lemke (trustor/trustee).

The parties presented oral argument to support their positions. Status of mediation is continued to May 22, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Petition for Order Settling Accounts, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

March 27, 2024.

Per Judicial Officer: The Petition for Order Settling Accounts, etc. is unsubmitted and is continued to May 22, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Off Calendar Jan-03-2024 Continued To Jan-17-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Settling Accounts, Passing Upon Acts Of And Instructing Co-Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-03-2024 Continued To Jan-17-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar Oct-25-2023 Continued To Jan-03-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lily Harris, Esq. in person for and with Anna Kauffman, Co-Trustee;
Anna Kauffman, Co-Trustee, in person;
Matthew Harris, Esq. via Zoom for Ilse Lemke, Trustor/Co-Trustee.

The Court stated that the trust is revocable, that the trustor is still with us and does not lack capacity nor has there been a showing of lack of capacity, that the trustor can revoke, that a petition for elder abuse has not been filed or brought which would be a "marker" for the Court, but that is not the petition that is before the Court today. Ms. Harris stated that the accounting was requested by Ms. Lemke's counsel, that the last thing this family needs is an undue influence claim, that the settlor keeps hiring attorneys, and that the accounting needs to be approved so that they can get some traction to avoid additional litigation. Mr. Harris stated that he suggested that they get a private fiduciary and continue this matter 30-60 days, that the fighting needs to stop, and that he would make the same suggestion re: a private fiduciary if the parties were to mediate. Ms. Harris responded stating that everything is on the table in mediation. Discussions regarding mediation/a mediator in Wisconsin are held. Mr. Harris stated that he would prefer in-person mediation. The Court and counsel briefly confer regarding pro bono mediation.

At the conclusion of comments/discussions, the parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than December 20, 2023. The parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by December 29, 2023. The matter is continued to, and the parties are to return on January 3, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: R. Cabrera. Matter not reported.

Petition For Order Settling Accounts, Passing Upon Acts Of And Instructing Co-Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-27-2023 Continued To Oct-25-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Matthew Harris appeared via zoom for Isle Lemke (co-trustee).
Lily Harris appeared in person for and with Anna Kaufman (co-trustee).

Discussion was held regarding as to the assets being moved to the trust account, that the settlor filed an objection, that no legal determination of a mild dementia with Ms. Lemke, and that she is seeking $10,000.00 a month allowance. Parties to meet and confer about mediation and facilitating private phone conversations with Ms. Lemke and Ms. Kauffman. Petition for order settling accounts, passing upon acts of and instructing co-trustee is continued to October 25, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status of mediation is also set for the same date.

Judge: Ross Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Maloney. Not reported.
